prompt: Review PR #4393 in DataDog/dd-trace-go. It adds automatic code migration fixes (v2fix) for upgrading from v1 to v2 of the tracer API, including AST rewrites.

assertions.text: Flags that golden_generator.go is in the production v2fix package despite being test-only infrastructure — it should be a _test.go file to avoid adding the testing package as a production dependency
Flags that TestFalsePositives does not cover the four new analyzers (ChildOfStartChild, AppSecLoginEvents, DeprecatedWithPrioritySampling, DeprecatedWithHTTPRoundTripper)
Notes that v2ContribModulePaths is a manually maintained hardcoded list that can silently drift from the actual contrib/ directory structure
